summary: Implemented Stage 9D skill promotion proposal validation with typed golden-eval evidence contracts, a read-only skill-promotion-validate CLI, focused tests, and file-purpose registration.

tests_run.command: uv run --no-sync python -B -m pytest tests/test_skill_promotion.py -q -p no:cacheprovider

tests_run.summary: 354 passed plus Ruff, format, mypy, CLI smoke checks, file justification, public hygiene, planning integrity, skill inventory, source inventory, protected locks, and uv lock --check.

A local helper or CLI validates skill pr.evidence: src/codex_supervisor/skill_promotion.py defines SkillPromotionProposal validation for skill_name, motivation, provenance, rollback_plan, changed_paths, and nonempty golden_evals; src/codex_supervisor/cli.py exposes the read-only skill-promotion-validate command.

Golden eval evidence requires stable tas.evidence: GoldenEvalEvidence requires task_id, task_name, baseline_summary, candidate_summary, status in passed/failed, and either reviewer or automated_verdict_rationale; tests/test_skill_promotion.py covers reviewer and automated-verdict variants plus invalid status.

Invalid proposals fail before any skill,.evidence: skill-promotion-validate loads and validates only the proposal JSON. tests/test_skill_promotion.py creates planning, skill, and insight sentinels and asserts invalid payload failure leaves them unchanged and creates no extra files.

Focused tests cover valid proposal norma.evidence: uv run --no-sync python -B -m pytest tests/test_skill_promotion.py -q -p no:cacheprovider passed with valid normalization, missing provenance, missing rollback, missing golden-eval evidence, CLI JSON, and human output coverage.

review.summary: Fresh-thread-style local review found no actionable findings for the Stage 9D skill promotion eval contract diff.

risks: This slice validates skill promotion proposals only; it does not yet edit repo-local skills or run golden tasks automatically.
Skill promotion threshold and durable decision-record wiring remain future Stage 9 work.
Live Codex Exec remains disabled for this worker run because local Codex CLI preflight is still unavailable in this environment.
follow_up_tasks: Wire skill-golden-eval-loop to produce and consume these proposal records with real golden task artifacts.
Add a durable promotion decision recorder once the proposal and eval artifact shape is proven.
Continue to Stage 10 Codex local-state adapter work after the Stage 9 learning loop is intentionally closed.
handoff_notes: Stage 9D adds skill_promotion.py and the skill-promotion-validate CLI. The contract validates proposal provenance, rollback, changed paths, and golden-eval evidence before any skill promotion workflow can write repo-local skills or durable learning records.
